title: Wave-Former: Through-Occlusion 3D Reconstruction via Wireless Shape Completion
authors: Laura Dodds; Maisy Lam; Waleed Akbar; Yibo Cheng; Fadel Adib
summary_cn: 利用毫米波无线信号穿透遮挡并结合物理约束 shape completion，实现隐藏日常物体的三维形状重建。
summary_en: A through-occlusion mmWave reconstruction method that bridges wireless signals and physics-aware 3D shape completion.
why_include_cn: 该工作与 through-occlusion、毫米波三维重建和无线 shape completion 直接相关，是此前关键词体系容易漏掉的方向。
why_include_en: Included because it captures the through-occlusion mmWave reconstruction family that generic radar point-cloud queries missed.
download_note: arXiv preprint; no final venue was verified during this pass.

title: RISE: Single Static Radar-based Indoor Scene Understanding
authors: Kaichen Zhou; Laura Dodds; Sayed Saad Afzal; Fadel Adib
summary_cn: 使用单个静态毫米波雷达进行室内场景理解，联合布局重建和物体检测，并利用多径反射中的几何信息。
summary_en: A single-static mmWave radar benchmark and system for indoor layout reconstruction and object detection using multipath geometry.
why_include_cn: 这是毫米波雷达从点云/建图走向室内场景理解的重要近作，属于隐藏毫米波模块必须跟踪的方向。
why_include_en: Directly addresses static-radar indoor scene reconstruction and object-level understanding, a gap missed by the previous mmWave side-track policy.
download_note: arXiv preprint; no final venue was verified during this pass.
